category_sources: source_facts.description states CALCEPH is a C library to access binary planetary ephemeris files; official IMCCE page describes planetary ephemeris access.
display_name_sources: Official IMCCE page uses the CALCEPH name; source_facts.name is calceph.
docs_sources: Official IMCCE CALCEPH page links to the latest reference manuals at calceph.imcce.fr/documentations/latest/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; official IMCCE CALCEPH page links to the GitLab repository as the latest development source code.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies planetary ephemeris file access; official IMCCE page lists C, Fortran, Python, and Octave/Matlab interfaces.
